# NOIZU-DIRECT

NOIZU-DIRECT is a Southeast Asian creator marketplace where cosplayers, illustrators, doujin artists, and prop makers sell directly to fans.

## About
- Founded by NOIZU, organizer of World Cosplay Summit Malaysia
- Based in Selangor, Malaysia
- Serving: Malaysia, Singapore, Philippines, Indonesia, Thailand
- Products: Digital art, doujin, cosplay prints, physical merch, print-on-demand, stickers, commissions

## Key pages
- /marketplace — browse all creator products
- /creators — discover SEA creators
- /blog — creator guides and community news
- /help — FAQ and support
- /buyer-protection — buyer protection details
- /pod-policy — print on demand policy

## Platform facts
- Platform fee: 0% (launch period)
- Processing fee: 2.5% per transaction
- Withdrawal fee: 4%
- Buyer protection: escrow on all physical and POD orders
- Digital dispute window: 7 days
- Physical dispute window: 14 days
- POD dispute window: 21 days

## Contact
hello@noizu.direct
